content:
## v2 ‚Äî Rust rewrite

### Architecture

```
crates/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ dorea-color   ‚Äî D-Log M, sRGB‚ÜîLAB, RGB‚ÜîHSV color math
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ dorea-lut     ‚Äî Depth-stratified 33¬≥ LUT build + trilinear apply
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ dorea-hsl     ‚Äî 6-vector HSL qualifier derive + apply
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ dorea-cal     ‚Äî .dorea-cal calibration file format (bincode)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ dorea-video   ‚Äî Phase 2: ffmpeg NVDEC/NVENC integration (placeholder)
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ dorea-cli     ‚Äî `dorea` binary (calibrate / grade / preview)
```


### Pipeline (Phase 1)

```
keyframes + depth maps + RAUNE targets
         ‚Üì
dorea calibrate   ‚Üí  calibration.dorea-cal
         ‚Üì
dorea grade       ‚Üí  graded video  (Phase 3)
```
